<reflection>the base form is “bukas.” to mark the completed aspect, filipino inserts the infix ­-in- after the word’s initial consonant, yielding “b-in-ukas” → “binukas,” so the affix involved is the infix ‑in-.</reflection>
<answer>-in-</answer>
